title: Bulaba
description: A minimalistic pvp focused resource pack with cleaner GUI.
body:
# **Bulaba**
A custom Minecraft resource pack designed to enhance your Bedwars experience. Includes retextured swords, wool blocks, pearls, diamonds, black UI and more — with upcoming textures for fireballs, arrows, and all GUI's!

For 1.8.9 users: You'll need the optional [GUI Patch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bguipatch) to remove the offhand slot.

I'm currently working on 0.2 - it will have better textures shading and all previous changes on versions below 1.21
